sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112300" key="frenwth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρεν-ωτήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112300.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">means of instruction,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
